competitors.name: ts-go-run-types
competitors.source: {build: () => createValidate<{kind: 'a'; n: number} | {kind: 'b'; s: string}>(), buildErrors: () => noErrs(createGetValidationErrors<{kind: 'a'; n: number} | {kind: 'b'; s: string}>())}

competitors.name: zod
competitors.source: c(z.union([z.object({kind: z.literal('a'), n: z.number().finite()}), z.object({kind: z.literal('b'), s: z.string()})]))

competitors.name: typebox
ajv
competitors.source:
c({anyOf: [
      {type: 'object', properties: {kind: {const: 'a'}, n: {type: 'number'}}, required: ['kind', 'n']},
      {type: 'object', properties: {kind: {const: 'b'}, s: {type: 'string'}}, required: ['kind', 's']},
    ]}, {invalid: [{kind: 'c', n: 1}, {kind: 'a', n: 'not number'}, {n: 1}, null, 'not object', undefined, {kind: 'a'}, {kind: 'b'}]})
